create.description: Name the campaign. You can optionally start from a campaign template, then edit its content.
create.title: New campaign

archive.description: When enabled, this campaign appears in the tenant's public archive index, on its standalone page, and in the RSS feed.
archive.hidden: Campaign is hidden from the public archive.
archive.shown: Campaign is now visible in the public archive.
archive.title: Public archive

autoPaused.description: Sending was paused automatically after reaching {{count}} send errors. Review and resume, or cancel the campaign.
autoPaused.title: Campaign auto-paused

confirmCancel.description: The campaign will stop sending and cannot be resumed.
confirmCancel.title: Cancel this campaign?

confirmStart.description: Sending begins immediately and cannot be undone. You can pause or cancel it once running.
confirmStart.title: Start this campaign?

content.description: Edit the campaign’s subject and content. HTML is sent as-is.
content.title: Content

domainRequired.description: Select a verified sending domain below before this campaign can be started.
domainRequired.title: A verified sending domain is required

quotaBlocked.descriptionBefore: This campaign was not started because the workspace has used its plan's send allowance for the current period. Review your
quotaBlocked.title: Send allowance reached

recipients.description: Select one or more lists to send to.
recipients.emptyMessage: Create a list of subscribers to target.
recipients.title: Recipients

sender.description: Choose a verified sending domain and the from address.
sender.noVerifiedDomains: No verified domains yet. Verify a domain under Sending Domains first.
sender.title: Sender

suspendedBlocked.descriptionBefore: This campaign was not started because the workspace is suspended for non-payment. Settle the outstanding balance in
suspendedBlocked.title: Account suspended

list.description: Author and send campaigns to your lists.
list.emptyMessage: Create your first campaign to start sending.
list.title: Campaigns

visual.convertedSuccess: Converted to visual editor. Review and save to keep it.
visual.convertedWarnings_few: Converted to visual editor with {{count}} blocks preserved as raw HTML. Review and save to keep the visual document.
visual.convertedWarnings_many: Converted to visual editor with {{count}} blocks preserved as raw HTML. Review and save to keep the visual document.
visual.convertedWarnings_one: Converted to visual editor with {{count}} block preserved as raw HTML. Review and save to keep the visual document.
visual.convertedWarnings_other: Converted to visual editor with {{count}} blocks preserved as raw HTML. Review and save to keep the visual document.

optOut.description: Your structured visual document will be discarded. The last saved HTML body stays intact so the campaign remains sendable, but blocks, columns, and merge-tag chips will no longer be available unless you convert back later.
optOut.title: Switch to HTML-only editing?

visual.optOutSuccess: Switched to HTML-only mode. The structured document was cleared.
